name: Ambulance with same modifiers
description: Validation of multiple ambulance trips on the same day. Mod 76 indicates a duplicate but must be verified against pick-up/drop-off locations.

overpayment_conditions.unsupported_duplicate: Multiple ambulance claims with same modifier (especially Mod 76) without supporting history or distinct locations.
overpayment_conditions.location_match: Pick-up and Drop-off locations match exactly on multiple claims, suggesting a duplicate billing of the same trip.

explanation_templates.valid: Multiple ambulance trips supported by distinct locations or member history.
explanation_templates.duplicate: Mod 76 used on multiple claims without evidence of separate trips or distinct locations.
